top_signals.title: Gold Drops Below $4,000 as Fed Rate Hike Bets Surge
top_signals.summary: In this Metals Spotlight segment, Bloomberg's Metals Reporter Jack Ryan talks about how oil prices and a renewed US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz are impacting gold and silver prices. Bullion slid below $4,000 an ounce during trading on Monday as Fed Governor Christopher Waller said policymakers may need to raise rates in the near term. Ryan reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Chipotle is opening its first restaurant in Mexico
top_signals.summary: Fast casual chain Chipotle announced Monday that it is opening its first location in Mexico in the Monterrey area.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
